rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 6, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY QUESADA's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien Continued to June 4, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than May 15, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 490 TANZANITE LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIOMITED LIABILITY VS. PROPARK AMERICA WEST LLC, A CONNECTICUT et al

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. MARTIN ENG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 6, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT MARTIN ENG's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED, verification is sufficient. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. MARTIN ENG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 6, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT MARTIN ENG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support all elements of CCP 1161a unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATHERINE VOUTYRAS VS. PETER WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summond And Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 6, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT PETER WONG's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Amended Complaint GRANTED. Notice of Termination of Tenancy is fatally defective as it does not comply with CC 1946.1(h). = (501/REQ)
